context: Tests whether the agent applies the correct Workbox caching strategies for each resource type in a PWA storefront service worker, including specific configuration values, the prohibition on caching checkout/cart pages, and background sync for offline cart operations.

checklist.name: vite-plugin-pwa used
checklist.description: The vite.config.ts uses vite-plugin-pwa (VitePWA import) rather than workbox-webpack-plugin or a manual service worker registration approach

checklist.name: autoUpdate register type
checklist.description: The VitePWA plugin has registerType set to 'autoUpdate'

checklist.name: Precache glob patterns
checklist.description: The Workbox globPatterns includes at least js, css, html, svg, png, webp, and woff2 file types

checklist.name: precacheAndRoute + cleanupOutdatedCaches
checklist.description: The custom service worker (sw.js) calls both precacheAndRoute(self.__WB_MANIFEST) and cleanupOutdatedCaches()

checklist.name: Product images CacheFirst
checklist.description: Product images (CDN hostname or /product-images/ path) use CacheFirst strategy

checklist.name: Image cache expiry limits
checklist.description: Product image caching uses ExpirationPlugin with maxEntries of 200 and maxAgeSeconds of 604800 (7 days / 60*60*24*7)

checklist.name: Products cache limits
checklist.description: The products cache uses ExpirationPlugin with maxEntries of 500 and maxAgeSeconds of 86400 (24 hours)

checklist.name: Collections NetworkFirst with timeout
checklist.description: The /api/collections route uses NetworkFirst strategy with networkTimeoutSeconds set to 3

checklist.name: Cart background sync
checklist.description: Non-GET cart operations (/api/cart) use BackgroundSyncPlugin with a queue name and maxRetentionTime of 1440 (24 hours in minutes)

checklist.name: No cart/checkout caching
checklist.description: The /cart and /checkout routes are NOT added to any caching strategy (no CacheFirst, StaleWhileRevalidate, or NetworkFirst for these paths) — or they are explicitly set to NetworkOnly

checklist.name: ExpirationPlugin on all caches
checklist.description: Every runtime cache that is set up includes an ExpirationPlugin with maxEntries defined

checklist.name: Cart uses NetworkFirst
checklist.description: The cart background sync route wraps the BackgroundSyncPlugin inside a NetworkFirst strategy (not CacheFirst or StaleWhileRevalidate)
